title: dendrium lyonii
intro: Dendrium lyonii, also known as Lyon's sedge or sedge grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infections. The health benefits of Dendrium lyonii include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Dendrium lyonii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
